case_title: ROBERT C. HARTMAN VS. TED ALFARO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SCOTT DICKEY, GENERAL COUNSEL FOR SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT APPEARED ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. FILED BY DEFENDANT ALFARO, TED
MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE HEARING DATES:, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT ALFARO, TED HEARING SET FOR DEC-13-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HARTMAN, ROBERT C. AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO, TED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARTMAN, ROBERT C. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE HEARING DATES: OF DEC-13-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR - MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS WITHDRAWN BY THE DEFENDANT. (VIA SCOTT DICKEY).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SCOTT DICKEY--GENERAL COUNCI, WHO DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
